channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped office chair corner Tor/Okehampton, 11th April
item.description:
See above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Okehampton Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay, 11th April
item.description:
E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Complaint: Tree Root Damage to Pavement and Garden Wall — 58 Bromley Common, BR2 9PF, 11th April
item.description:
The tree's root system has caused structural damage to both the adjacent pavement and my front garden wall. The pavement has been pushed upward by the roots, creating a hazard for pedestrians and allowing rubbish to accumulate. Meanwhile, my front garden wall has developed a crack of approximately 1cm by 60cm and has begun to tilt on one side. I would be very grateful if the Bromley Council could arrange for an inspection of the tree and the surrounding area at the earliest opportunity, and advise on what action will be taken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Bromley Common, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 11th April
item.description:
Black Ford Fiesta VRM: MD69 FCU This vehicle appears to be abandoned. It hasn’t moved at all for months. Parking is extremely limited in the area and it is likely that this vehicle may be stolen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, The Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste in the street from bin men between 26 & 28 Derrick road, 11th April
item.description:
Food waste in the street from bin men between 26 & 28 Derrick road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Derrick Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter outside heist grill and art shop, 11th April
item.description:
As reported earlier the council bin near the art shop in avenue road sits 2 plastic bags of rubbish and a council bin filled to the top! These plastic bags have been there for over 4 days’ o had reported this once but repeating myself again. The skips are still overflowing! Causing litter to fly everywhere.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped tyre with rubish, 11th April
item.description:
There has been a dumped tyre on the left-hand corner to entrance of The Drive from Brook Street. People have been leaving cans and bottles within the centre of the tire.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 247, The Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 11th April
item.description:
Someone has bumped a lot of rubbish, you cant drive through on the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goudhurst Road, Downham, Greater London

item.title: Signed defaced on Willowbrook Road with graffiti, 11th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned vehilcle, 11th April
item.description:
There is what appears to be an abandoned and damaged Nissan Juke outside my father’s house at 3 Amherst Drive, St Mary Cray BR5 2ER
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London

At 1-11 Orpen Walk, Yorkshire Grove Estate, Stoke Newington.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orpen Walk, Hackney, London

item.title: Water bubbling up from cover in road, 11th April
item.description:
Water main presumably broken and water is being wasted. It is at the junction of Meadway gate roundabout and Hoop Lane. This problem has occurred several times in the last few years at this location

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadway Gate, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car constantly inappropriately parked, 11th April
item.description:
This car is currently parked on the grass verge right next to the pelican crossing and it is continuously parked on grass verges or paving in this vicinity, rather than in parking spaces

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on my driveway, 11th April
item.description:
Mattress has been dumped just in side my driveway at No 84 ,it has Been there for over 2 weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped in the woodland along London Road, 11th April
item.description:
Several large plastic bags of rubbish have been dumped in the woodland, in view of the foot path that runs inside the park, opposite the houses along London Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 11th April
item.description:
Torridon Road opposite library. Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Torridon Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipped on Bazalgette Way, London, 11th April
item.description:
I would like to report a significant fly-tipping incident located on the curve of Bazalgette Way. The pile consists of a large amount of Howdens-branded cardboard packaging and several full black bin bags. The waste is dumped against the perimeter fence and is partially obstructing the roadway. Please see the attached photo for the exact scale and contents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of empty cans and unpleasant bottles dumped in woods along the footpath next to the gasometers concrete fence.., 11th April
item.description:
Over a hundred empty alcohol cans and numerous plastic bottles full of urine have been dumped in the woodland verge and along the pathway that runs through the woods alongside the concrete fence next to the old gasometers. These have built up over time as presumably this is a regular 'meeting place' !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
This spot is absolutely disgusting all the time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
